title: Navitas Semiconductor Q1 2026 Financial Results
text: Navitas Semiconductor (NASDAQ: NVTS) reported first-quarter 2026 results on May 5, 2026. The company achieved revenue of $8.6 million, up 18% sequentially compared to Q4 2025's $7.3 million. However, revenue declined significantly from the prior-year period, down from $14.0 million in Q1 2025, representing a substantial year-over-year contraction of approximately 39%. The earnings report revealed mixed results on profitability measures: GAAP gross margin was negative 9.3% for Q1 2026, while non-GAAP gross margin was 39.0%, up slightly from 38.7% in Q4 2025. GAAP operating loss was $27.8 million for the quarter, while non-GAAP operating loss was $11.7 million. Management provided Q2 2026 guidance expecting revenue of $10.0 million ± $0.5 million with non-GAAP gross margin of 39.25% ± 75 bps. The company emphasized its strategic pivot toward high-power markets, including AI data centers and industrial electrification, moving away from legacy mobile and consumer segments.
